user.title: Set up HA Auto Dashboard
user.description: HA Auto Dashboard will scan your areas, devices and entities and keep an internal dashboard graph up to date automatically. No configuration is required.

abort.already_configured: HA Auto Dashboard is already configured.

scan.name: Scan
scan.description: Re-discover areas, devices and entities and rebuild the internal dashboard graph immediately, instead of waiting for the next scheduled or registry-triggered scan. Also regenerates dashboards once the scan completes.

generate.name: Generate
generate.description: Recompile the Home, Rooms, Homelab, Security, Monitoring, Admin and Cloud dashboards from the current discovery graph and write them to the dashboards/ folder, without doing a fresh scan first.
